title: CSLmcClient
description:
This modpack is no longer being worked on in the CslMc server due to requests from server staff and community to switch to back  to paper.
I have Archived it for anyone who still wants to try the pack for their own reason.
I am sorry for any inconvenience!
body:
This modpack is no longer being worked on in the CslMc server due to requests from server staff and community to switch to back  to paper.
I have Archived it for anyone who still wants to try the pack for their own reason.
I am sorry for any inconvenience!

## The modpack for the CSLmc server
### What we hope to see!
  Here we come to build, pvp, play in events, hang out with friends, role play and much more.
  We look forward to having a well paced and respectable community.

###   What kind of mods do we have included?

<details><summary>Gameplay mechanics!:</summary>
CERBON's Better Beacons | Copper Grates Bubble | 
Distracting Trims | Elytra Slot | Fire Arrows Ignite Fire | Mouse Tweaks| Potion Sauce | Potion Stacking | Realistic Fire Spread | Traveler's Backpack | Trinkets | Veinminer | Veinminer Enchantment | Waystones | Voice Chat Interaction | Zombie Awareness</details>

<details><summary>Voice and sound, animations and furniture!:</summary> 3D Skin Layers | AppleSkin | Essential Mod | IllagerBlabber | Let Sleeping Dogs Lie | Not Enough Animations | Simple Voice Chat</details>

<details><summary>Building, claims, world generation and exploration!:</summary> 
_Another Furniture | Biomes O' Plenty | Dungeons and Taverns | Open Parties and Claims | Serene Seasons | Tom's Simple Storage Mod | Xaero's Minimap | Xaero's World Map_</details>

<details><summary>A new look!:</summary> 
AppleSkin | BetterF3 | Clumps | Eating Animation | Iris Shaders | Sodium Dynamic Lights | 
Tool Trims Mod</details>

<details><summary>Better fps and other!:</summary> 
Chunky | Lithium | Mod Menu | Noisium | Reese's Sodium Options | Sodium | Sodium Extra | Sodium Options API | XXL Packets</details>
